title: OreEdge
description: OreEdge - Outlined Ores Texture Pack with clean modern outlines for all ores including deepslate variants that make ores easy to spot while keeping Minecraft vanilla
body:
OreEdge – Outlined Ores Texture Pack

Give your Minecraft world a modern, clean look by outlining every ore block with bright, visible borders. Perfect for survival or creative builds.

Features:
- Fully outlined ores, including deepslate variants
- Clean, vibrant style for better visibility
- Works on Minecraft 1.21+
- Lightweight and vanilla-friendly
- Made by: Teddz

Disclaimer: If your game or mods say this pack is "not compatible," it's fine — it still works in-game.![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2aafa244b82a49294cb3240dcff9588d53611162.png)
